task: User asks for loop design in GBrain without naming a source; the skill should still require source discovery and topic inventory before answering.

checks.arg: semantic search ranking as recall assistance

task: User names AI Notes and says a document exists there; the skill should force the AI Notes source path instead of default/federated-only search.

checks.arg: Use this path whenever the user says "AI Notes"

task: User supplies a file path inside a GBrain source root; the skill should derive and read the slug before broad summary.
Semantic search returns plausible but incomplete top hits; the skill should not treat ranking as complete proof.

checks.arg: Treat semantic search ranking as recall assistance

task: MCP search is missing and CLI is needed; the skill should include source-bound CLI commands.

checks.arg: Use CLI when MCP tools are missing

task: User says the assistant missed a specific document; the skill should retry with exact source/path lookup.

checks.arg: says you missed a specific document
Read every obvious title, slug, or path match

task: User asks for all close loop notes in AI Notes; the skill should combine source-bound search, list, and file inventory.
User gives a source-root path and wants the page summarized; the skill should read the exact page first.

checks.arg: If the user supplied a source-root file path

task: Federated search finds default-source blog summaries but the requested document lives in AI Notes; the skill should separate direct and related matches.

checks.arg: Do not present broad/federated top hits

task: The source exposes a local root; the skill should use local inventory as discovery but not as final proof without reading.

checks.arg: when the source exposes a local root
Use source-root `rg` only for candidate discovery

task: A write task names a source; the skill should still protect source-bound writes and verification.

checks.arg: Use the source the user names

task: A broad memory answer should cite pages by source id and slug after reading them.

checks.arg: memory answers are based on fetched GBrain content

task: The assistant should not assume AI Notes is the only brain source when the user is vague.

checks.arg: Do not assume AI Notes is the whole brain
If the user asks a general memory question

task: The skill should explicitly forbid answering exact-path lookups from federated search alone.

checks.arg: Answering a named-source or exact-path lookup

task: The skill should route exact path lookups to the CLI reference and require source-bound source-root discovery.
For broad topic discovery, the skill should collect a wide candidate pool before narrowing.
For broad searches, the skill should filter and rerank candidates before opening final pages.
The final result set should be based on opened documents, not snippets alone.

checks.arg: Open and inspect enough top candidates
Do not finalize a top result from title or snippet alone

task: The search mechanism should normally return a top 10 document set after reranking.

checks.arg: Return roughly the top 10 relevant pages by default
If fewer than 10 are actually relevant
if more than 10 are strong matches

task: The skill should define broad-to-final retrieval and top-10 finalization in the main operating instructions.
